zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwilym ap Gruffydd於1300年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾白 康維時，他的父親Gruffydd Ap Heilyn36歲，母親Efa F Gruffydd ap Tudur of Penhwnllys22歲。他於大約1322年與Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾康維結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1370年在威爾士凱爾納方史爾利安德加享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwilym ap Gruffydd于1300年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾白 康維时，他的父亲Gruffydd Ap Heilyn36岁，母亲Efa F Gruffydd ap Tudur of Penhwnllys22岁。他于大约1322年与Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾康維结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1370年在威尔士凱爾納方史爾利安德加享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Gwilym
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Gwilim
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Gwillym
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwilym ap Gruffydd was born in 1300, in Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales, his father, Gruffydd Ap Heilyn, was 36 and his mother, Efa F Gruffydd ap Tudur of Penhwnllys, was 22. He married Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur about 1322, in Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1370, in Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwilym ap Gruffydd est né en 1300, à Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Gruffydd Ap Heilyn, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Efa F Gruffydd ap Tudur of Penhwnllys, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur environ 1322, à Conway, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1370, à Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwilym ap Gruffydd 1300 in Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd Ap Heilyn 36 und seine Mutter Efa F Gruffydd ap Tudur of Penhwnllys 22. Er hat um 1322 in Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1370 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwilym ap Gruffydd è nato il nel 1300 nel Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Galles, il suo padre, Gruffydd Ap Heilyn, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Efa F Gruffydd ap Tudur of Penhwnllys, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur circa 1322, nel Conway, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1370, nel Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwilym ap Gruffyddが1300年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアペンルhイン ビー コンワイで生まれた時，父Gruffydd Ap Heilynは36歳，母Efa F Gruffydd ap Tudur of Penhwnllysは22歳であった。約1322年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアコンワイでEfa verch Griffith ap Tudurと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1370年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアランデガイで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwilym ap Gruffydd(이)가 1300년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜히 비 콘웨이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd Ap Heilyn(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Efa F Gruffydd ap Tudur of Penhwnllys(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1322년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 콘웨이에서 Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1370년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 랜데가이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwilym ap Gruffydd nasceu em 1300, em Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Gruffydd Ap Heilyn, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Efa F Gruffydd ap Tudur of Penhwnllys, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur aproximadamente 1322, em Conway, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1370, em Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwilym ap Gruffydd родился в 1300 г. в местности пенрин би конвеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gruffydd Ap Heilyn было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Efa F Gruffydd ap Tudur of Penhwnllys, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur около 1322 г. в местности конвеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1370 г. в местности лландегеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwilym ap Gruffydd nació en 1300, en Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Gruffydd Ap Heilyn, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Efa F Gruffydd ap Tudur of Penhwnllys, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Efa verch Griffith ap Tudur aproximadamente 1322, en Conway, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1370, en Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 70 años.
